title: Fix errors and merge to main
body: Integrate changes from the `cursor/fix-errors-and-merge-to-main-945d` branch, which contains committed merge conflicts. This branch was created to check for and fix errors in the repository. Although the AI assistant reported that all checks passed and no errors were found, the generated diff shows that merge conflict markers were committed into the branch. These conflicts need to be resolved as part of this PR. ---

title: Fix errors and merge to main
body: Fix TypeScript errors related to `lucide-react` imports and missing components to enable successful project build. The project was failing to type-check and build due to incorrect `lucide-react` import resolution, an outdated `moduleResolution` setting in `tsconfig.json`, and references to non-existent components. This PR updates the TypeScript configuration, introduces a custom `lucide-react.d.ts` type declaration file, and cleans up problematic imports and component references. ---

title: Fix errors and merge to main
body: Resolve merge conflicts and fix associated TypeScript errors to restore a clean, buildable state. The repository contained numerous merge conflict markers across 98 files, preventing a successful build and type checking. This PR systematically resolves these conflicts and addresses subsequent TypeScript syntax errors, ensuring the application builds correctly and tests pass. ---
